---
title: Characterizing Soft-Error Resiliency in Arm's Ethos-U55 Embedded Machine Learning
  Accelerator
author:
- Abhishek Tyagi
- Reiley Jeyapaul
- Chuteng Zhou
- Paul Whatmough
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/ispass24.pdf
journ: ISPASS
year: 2024
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 76
---
